title: Oussudu Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Oussudu Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Puducherry

overview.short: Oussudu or Ousteri Bird Sanctuary (French: Réserve Ornithologique d'Oussudu) is the first and the only wildlife sanctuary in the Indian union territory of Puducherry.
overview.description: Oussudu or Ousteri Bird Sanctuary (French: Réserve Ornithologique d'Oussudu) is the first and the only wildlife sanctuary in the Indian union territory of Puducherry. It was created in 2008. It spans over 390 acres around the Ousteri lake.

topPlaces.name: Ousteri Lake
topPlaces.description: Ousteri Lake (French: Lac Oustéri) is a lake shared between the union territory of Puducherry, and the state of Tamil Nadu. The spatial extend of the lake is almost equal in between the two states, and it is one of the largest tanks in the Puducherry region.

topPlaces.name: Thondamanatham firka
topPlaces.description: Thondamanatham is one of the 4 Firkas of Villianur taluk in Pondicherry (North) Revenue Sub-division of the Indian union territory of Puducherry.

topPlaces.name: Kurumbapet
topPlaces.description: Kurumbapet is a town and a gram panchayat in Pondicherry district in the Indian union territory of Puducherry.

topPlaces.name: Dharmapuri (Puducherry)
topPlaces.description: Dharmapuri is a ward in Oulgaret Municipality of Pondicherry district in the Indian union territory of Puducherry.

topPlaces.name: Kameeswarar temple
topPlaces.description: Thirukameeswarar Temple (also called Kokilamba - Kameeswarar temple or Villianur Temple or kameeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Villianur, a town in the South Indian union territory of Puducherry. Shiva is worshiped as Kameeswarar, and is represented by the lingam.

topPlaces.name: Villianur taluk
topPlaces.description: Villianur taluk (Tamil: [ʋilːijnuːɾ]) is one of four taluks in the Pondicherry District of the union territory of Puducherry. It comprises villages under Villianur and Mannadipet Commune.

topPlaces.name: Villianur commune
topPlaces.description: Villianur is one of 5 Communes in Pondicherry district in the Indian territory of Puducherry. Villianur Commune comes under Villianur Taluk Of Puducherry District.

topPlaces.name: Villianur firka
topPlaces.description: Villianur is one of the 4 Firkas of Villianur taluk in Pondicherry (North) Revenue Sub-division of the Indian union territory of Puducherry.

items.note: Ousteri Lake (French: Lac Oustéri) is a lake shared between the union territory of Puducherry, and the state of Tamil Nadu. The spatial extend of the lake is almost equal in between the two states, and it is one of the largest tanks in the Puducherry region.
Thondamanatham is one of the 4 Firkas of Villianur taluk in Pondicherry (North) Revenue Sub-division of the Indian union territory of Puducherry.
Kurumbapet is a town and a gram panchayat in Pondicherry district in the Indian union territory of Puducherry.
Dharmapuri is a ward in Oulgaret Municipality of Pondicherry district in the Indian union territory of Puducherry.

Thirukameeswarar Temple (also called Kokilamba - Kameeswarar temple or Villianur Temple or kameeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Villianur, a town in the South Indian union territory of Puducherry. Shiva is worshiped as Kameeswarar, and is represented by the lingam.
Villianur taluk (Tamil: [ʋilːijnuːɾ]) is one of four taluks in the Pondicherry District of the union territory of Puducherry. It comprises villages under Villianur and Mannadipet Commune.
Villianur is one of 5 Communes in Pondicherry district in the Indian territory of Puducherry. Villianur Commune comes under Villianur Taluk Of Puducherry District.
Villianur is one of the 4 Firkas of Villianur taluk in Pondicherry (North) Revenue Sub-division of the Indian union territory of Puducherry.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Oussudu Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Oussudu Bird Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Oussudu Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (125 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (138 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Oussudu Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Oussudu Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Oussudu Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Oussudu Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Oussudu Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ousteri Lake, Thondamanatham firka, Kurumbapet, Dharmapuri (Puducherry), Kameeswarar temple.
